productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Blue Tops
description: Composition Blue V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and appliqué work on the left chest  Fitting Comfort  Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery  Flaunt your feminity in style with this blue T-shirt from united colors of benetton.
